title: When status changes, create new board: how?
excerpt: The automation to create a new board when a status changes: I can’t seem to find it. I have a pro-subscription: do the available automations depend on your type of subscription?

posts.author: SienFluvia (Sien Jacques)
posts.cookedHtml: The automation to create a new board when a status changes: I can’t seem to find it. I have a pro-subscription: do the available automations depend on your type of subscription?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @SienFluvia

Welcome to the community. The standard automations that create a board on a status change are:

image1706×337 17.7 KB

I don’t think you can use the “create a board action” block in the custom automations yet.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @SienFluvia,
In case you would like to create a new board with pre-defined items on status change or extra flexibility on how the board should be created, for example, the name of the board or group, you can check out the Duplicates and Uniques app.
Here is a video example of that.
In your case, you can use the “When this column changes to this,…” integration

If you have any question, you can reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: SienFluvia (Sien Jacques)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I do always tend to make my automations myself, so I overlooked this one. Thanks!
